name: aggregator preserves community-plugin rule ID that is already namespaced (does not double-prefix)
setup:
cat > tree/_community/react-perf/main/perf-rules.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: react-perf-plugin
  authoritative_publisher: react-perf-author
  authoritative_url: https://github.com/example/react-perf
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:rp
rules:
  - id: react-perf/no-inline-fn
    name: no-inline-functions
    description: Avoid inline functions in JSX props.
    detector: rubric/detectors/_community/react-perf/no-inline-fn.sh
recommended_set: [react-perf/no-inline-fn]
all_set: [react-perf/no-inline-fn]
EOF
